[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An anime-style illustration shows three young men sitting indoors near a window while each holds a small black-and-white object, with one wearing a green-and-gold necktie accessory.  

Main Subject:
Two anime characters are clearly visible in the foreground, each holding a small, black-and-white item in their hands as if demonstrating or passing it around; a third character appears at the right edge holding a similar item or another small object.  

Setting:
The scene is indoors, with a large window or light opening in the background showing a pale blue-gray outside area. The room has neutral walls, and a tabletop is partially visible at the bottom with a flat, pink-purple surface.  

Visual Details:
The character on the left has short dark blue hair, a dark jacket over a blue shirt, and a small strap or cord across the chest; he smiles with eyes angled downward. The character in the center-right has short brown hair, a dark blazer over a white shirt, and a green bow or tie with a gold band at the collar; he has a cheerful expression and is seated with his body angled slightly toward the viewer. Both central visible characters are holding the black-and-white objects close to their chests. Lighting appears soft and even, with cool tones from the window. The camera angle is straight-on to slightly elevated, framed tightly around the characters’ upper bodies and hands.  

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary:
The image depicts an anime-style scene of three seated characters inside a room near a window. They smile while holding small black-and-white items toward the viewer.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the provided screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text content:** [none detected]
- **Notes:** The screenshot appears to be an illustration with no clearly readable UI text, captions, or labels.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
